project_manifest.name: Universal Office
project_manifest.operational_status: OPERATIONAL — Phase 7.3 complete: Ethiopian Sa'atat 24-hour canonical cycle fully implemented and verified

documentation_debt.reason: All .md documentation was written against the pre-modularization monolithic index.html. None reflects the four-file modular architecture, Phase 6.4 ecumenical reorganization, Phase 6.5 QC fixes, or Phase 7.x Ethiopian tradition work.

changes: Added third mode button: 'The Ethiopian Sa'atat (Book of Hours)' with class ethiopian-btn, calling selectMode('ethiopian-saatat')

rubric_loop_handlers: VARIABLE_OPENING — resolves bcp-opening-${season}, fallback to bcp-opening-general
VARIABLE_ANTIPHON — resolves antiphon_mp or antiphon_ep from dailyData
VARIABLE_PSALM — renders appointed psalms with optional Gloria Patri
VARIABLE_READING_OT — OT lesson from independent morning or evening chain
VARIABLE_READING_EPISTLE — Epistle from independent morning or evening chain
VARIABLE_READING_GOSPEL — Gospel subject to gospelPlacement setting
VARIABLE_COLLECT — collect lookup with manual ID mappings; triggers Examen and Kyrie Pantocrator
VARIABLE_WEEKDAY_COLLECT — tiered fallback: dailyData.collect_weekday → bcp-collect-grace/peace → skip
eth-saatat-hour-slot — resolves canonical hour text from getEthiopianHourInfo().hourId
eth-mazmur-slot — renders appointed Psalms for active hour; closes with eth-anqasa-birhan
eth-saints-commemoration — filters appData.saints for Ethiopian/Oriental tradition; fallback intercession if none found
key_logic_notes: Reading resolution uses independent morning/evening chains — no shared intermediate variables between MP and EP
Theotokion uses two-step lookup: cop-theotokion-${season} with fallback to cop-theotokion

Examen text: \n\n converted to

, rendered in
toggleSidebar() propagates sidebar-hidden class to both #settings-panel and #main-content
CalendarEngine.init() is called explicitly in init() after JSON loads, before fetchLectionaryData()
resolvedOfficeId = window._forcedOfficeId || officeId — used throughout renderOffice() to support ethiopian-saatat override
Saints data preloaded before sequence loop so eth-saints-commemoration slot has access on first render
isEthiopianSaatat flag gates all BCP-specific pre/post-sequence blocks (Marian, Agpeya, East Syriac, Commemorations header, saint-display)
getEthiopianHourInfo() returns exhaustive 24-hour map; night watch (Lelit) covers both 21:00–24:00 and 00:00–06:00

js/calendar-engine.js.role: All date and liturgical calendar logic
public_methods: init() — loads bcp-propers.json; must be called before fetchLectionaryData()
getSeasonAndFile(date) — returns { season, file, liturgicalColor, litYear }
fetchLectionaryData(date) — returns daily entry object from seasonal JSON

js/scripture-resolver.js.role: Scripture text fetching, citation parsing, LRU book cache

css/office.css.role: All application styles — theming, sidebar, layout, print
css/office.css.status: Current — Phase 7.1 Ethiopian button styles added (2026-02-22)
changes: Added .ethiopian-btn — gold/yellow color scheme (border: #c9a84c, transparent background, Cinzel font)
Added .ethiopian-btn:hover — subtle gold background wash on hover
key_rules: #main-content — flex content area, transition: margin-left 0.3s ease
.ethiopian-btn — gold-bordered button for Sa'atat entry point
@media print — removes all UI chrome, optimizes for paper output

ethiopian_tradition.entry_point: selectMode('ethiopian-saatat') — sets window._forcedOfficeId, hides sidebar and settings panel, applies .ethiopian-theme to body
ethiopian_tradition.rubrics_load: Loaded in init() and concatenated onto appData.rubrics after data/rubrics.json
components: eth-basalios-prayer — St. Basil's foundational prayer (scaffold for all hours)
eth-anqasa-birhan — Gate of Light Theotokos hymn; appended after Mazmur in every hour
eth-tuat-hour-text — Canonical prayer text for Tuat (Morning Watch, 6:00–9:00)
eth-meserkh-hour-text — Canonical prayer text for Meserkh (Third Hour, 9:00–12:00)
eth-liku-hour-text — Canonical prayer text for Liku (Sixth Hour, 12:00–15:00)
eth-serkh-hour-text — Canonical prayer text for Serkh (Ninth Hour, 15:00–18:00)
eth-nimeat-hour-text — Canonical prayer text for Nimeat (Vespers, 18:00–21:00)
eth-night-hour-text — Canonical prayer text for Lelit (Night Watch, 21:00–06:00)
eth-saints-commemoration — Saints scaffold with Oriental Orthodox filter
ethiopian_tradition.saints_filter: Only saints where tradition includes 'ethiopian' or 'oriental' (case-insensitive). Fallback: generic intercession for the Oriental Orthodox Communion.
ethiopian_tradition.bcp_isolation: All BCP-specific blocks (Marian antiphons, Agpeya, East Syriac Hours, Commemorations header, saint-display) are gated behind !isEthiopianSaatat

data_summary.note: Individual data files are not enumerated here. See historical structure file for full listings.
data_summary.data/bible/: [600+ Scripture files across NT, OT, ET, SY, AR, ODES subdirectories]
data_summary.data/season/: [9 seasonal JSON files — 353 total BCP 1979 daily lectionary entries, Year One and Year Two tracks]
data_summary.data/components.json: DEPRECATED — do not use. Stale pre-modularization monolith.
data_summary.data/rubrics.json: BCP office sequence definitions (rubric arrays per office ID)
data_summary.data/season/bcp-propers.json: Proper 1–29 reference table, consumed by CalendarEngine.init()
Ethiopian Sa'atat office rubric — loaded and concatenated at init()

recent_logic_changes.detail: Maps local clock totalMinutes to { hourId, hourName, uiLabel, psalms } for all six canonical hours. Night watch (Lelit) covers both 21:00–24:00 and 00:00–06:00 via two entries in the hourMap array.
Sets window._forcedOfficeId = 'ethiopian-saatat', hides sidebar and settings panel, applies .ethiopian-theme to body, hides main H1, calls init() or renderOffice() as appropriate.
const resolvedOfficeId = window._forcedOfficeId || officeId — used for all office-specific flags and rubric lookup. Declared immediately after officeId.

eth-saatat-hour-slot resolves hour component via ethHourInfo.hourId. eth-mazmur-slot loops ethHourInfo.psalms and appends eth-anqasa-birhan. eth-saints-commemoration filters for Ethiopian/Oriental saints with intercession fallback.

recent_logic_changes.change: All BCP pre/post-sequence blocks gated behind !isEthiopianSaatat
recent_logic_changes.detail: Covers: Agpeya opening, East Syriac Hours, Marian antiphon (before and after), Commemorations header, saint-display innerHTML.
Fetches components/traditions/ethiopian/rubrics.json in a try/catch after main rubrics load; concatenates onto appData.rubrics.
Third button labeled 'The Ethiopian Sa'atat (Book of Hours)' with class ethiopian-btn below the Book of Needs button.
Transparent background, #c9a84c border and text, Cinzel font, hover state with subtle gold wash.
Meserkh (Third Hour, 9:00–12:00) commemorates descent of Holy Spirit at Pentecost. Liku (Sixth Hour, 12:00–15:00) commemorates the Crucifixion.

Serkh (Ninth Hour, 15:00–18:00) commemorates Christ's death. Nimeat (Vespers, 18:00–21:00) gives thanks for the day's close. Lelit (Night Watch, 21:00–06:00) covers the full night vigil including Gethsemane commemoration.
Added Serkh (15–18), Nimeat (18–21), Lelit night entries (21–24 and 00–06). Map is now exhaustive; fallback is retained but unreachable.

recent_logic_changes.change: Synchronized eth-saatat-hour-slot and eth-mazmur-slot time_map to full 24-hour cycle
recent_logic_changes.detail: Both slot metadata objects now document all six canonical windows with their appointed psalms.

recent_logic_changes.change: Saints JSON load moved before sequence loop
recent_logic_changes.detail: Ensures appData.saints is populated before eth-saints-commemoration slot executes, preventing fallback intercession on first render when saints data exists.
Commemorations header is hidden entirely on the Sa'atat page; date-header.style.display = 'none' set in the else branch.

recent_logic_changes.reason: Naming mismatch between seasonal JSON collect field and components.json entry ID

recent_logic_changes.change: Split shared reading variables into independent morning and evening chains
recent_logic_changes.detail: morningOT/morningEpistle/morningGospel resolved exclusively from _mp_ keys; eveningOT/eveningEpistle/eveningGospel resolved exclusively from _ep_ keys
recent_logic_changes.reason: Cross-contamination — EP keys were polluting MP resolution via shared intermediate variables

recent_logic_changes.change: CalendarEngine.init() call inserted between JSON data load and fetchLectionaryData()
recent_logic_changes.reason: Race condition — bcp-propers.json was not guaranteed loaded before lectionary fetch

recent_logic_changes.change: sidebar-hidden class now toggled on #main-content in addition to #settings-panel
recent_logic_changes.reason: Main content area did not reflow when sidebar was hidden

roadmap_summary.completed: Phases 6.1–6.5 (BCP lectionary, modularization, ecumenical organization, QC fixes), Phase 7.1–7.3 (Ethiopian Sa'atat — full 24-hour canonical cycle)
roadmap_summary.next_required: Phase 6.6 — Documentation rewrite (all .md files out of sync)
roadmap_summary.next_planned: Phase 6.7 — Performance polish (timezone warning, LRU for seasonal cache, prefetch, service worker)
roadmap_summary.future: Phase 7.4 — Ethiopian liturgical calendar integration (Ge'ez date display, Ethiopian fasting seasons); Phase 7.5 — Coptic Agpeya as standalone tradition entry; Phase 8.0 — Mobile app
